stages.description: SDNET2018 and upload project image provenance with dimensions, labels, and split metadata.
stages.name: Image Capture

stages.description: Resize, grayscale statistics, texture features, CLAHE, dark-ridge response, and edge enhancement.
stages.name: Preprocessing

stages.description: Binary crack probability and confidence for every image.
stages.name: Crack Detection

stages.description: Estimated pixel masks from morphology because SDNET2018 does not provide supervised masks.
stages.name: Crack Segmentation

stages.description: Area, area percent, skeleton length, mean width, max width, polygons, and component counts.
stages.name: Measurement Engine

stages.description: Pixel-estimated severity by default, with a calibration hook for mm-per-pixel thresholds.
stages.name: Severity Classification

stages.description: Polygon overlay, mask, and heatmap views for dataset and upload project inspection.
stages.name: Explainability

stages.description: Dataset dashboard and per-project reports returned through FastAPI and React.
stages.name: Final Inspection Output
